title: andrachne microphylla
intro: Andrachne microphylla, also known as the dwarf Andrachne or dwarf spurge, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Andrachne microphylla include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and stems can be used to make teas, tinctures, and extracts for medicinal purposes.
